original_title: JUX-326 Married Woman Highleg Shame Yuko Shiraki - Shiraki Yuko
overview: Yuko who remained in Tokyo without abandoning her dream of becoming a talent with her lover "Hayamizu" who had been transferred to Kyushu. The long-distance relationship didn't last so long and the two broke up ... And 15 years later, the two will meet again. The two became married to each other, but they couldn't control the feelings that remained in the corner of their heads, and secretly shared their time to regain their old days. One day, a suspicious man called out to Yuko walking around the city. And Yuko, who was shown a photo, was stunned ... [Campaign] A special limited video will be presented to customers who purchased the target work during the sale period! [About bonus video gifts] This is a product that is eligible for bonus video gifts. Bonus footage will be automatically added to your purchased products (videos) around the beginning of August. There is no individual notification when adding.
